headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on IDEXX Laboratories, Lowers Price Target to $675
summary: Stifel  analyst Jonathan Block   maintains IDEXX Laboratories (NASDAQ:IDXX) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $775 to $675.

headline: IDEXX LABORATORIES INC (NASDAQ:IDXX) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Stock Screen
summary: IDEXX Laboratories exemplifies quality investing with durable competitive advantages, high profitability, and strong financial health, making it a standout long-term growth candidate.
